title: Device for radial expansion of an acetabulum measuring head
abstract: The present invention relates to a device (1) for radial expansion of an acetabulum measuring head (2). The device comprises a distal part (1.1) having a central axis (a') for interaction and expansion of the acetabulum measuring head (2), a proximal part (1.2) comprising a rotator (1.3) controlling the radial expansion of the acetabulum measuring head (2), a core (1.4) within a sheath (1.5), said core (1.4) extending from the proximal part (1.2) to the distal part (1.1), wherein at least one central axis (b') of the core (1.4) does not coincide with the central axis (a') of the distal part (1.1), and wherein a rotation of the rotator (1.3) of the proximal part (1.2) of the device (1) leads to a radial expansion of the acetabulum measuring head (2). The invention further relates to an alignment guide system (3) adapted to be connected to the device (1), a torque- measuring device (4) adapted to be connected to the device (1) and to a system comprising the device (1), the alignment guide system (3) and/or the torque-measuring device.
claims: Claims 1. A device (1) for radial expansion of an acetabulum measuring head (2) comprising: a distal part (1.1) having a central axis (a') for interaction and expansion of the acetabulum measuring head (2); a proximal part (1.2) for controlling the radial expansion of the acetabulum measuring head (2); a core ( 1.4) within a sheath (1.5), said core (1.4) extending from the proximal part (1.2) to the distal part (1. 1); wherein at least one central axis (b') of the core (1.4) does not coincide with the central axis (a') of the distal part (1.1). 2. The device according to claim 1, wherein the proximal part (1.2) comprises a rotator (1.3) for controlling the radial expansion of the acetabulum measuring head (2), wherein a rotation of the rotator (1.3) of the proximal part (1.2) of the device (1) leads to a radial expansion of the acetabulum measuring head (2). 3. The device according to claim 1 or 2, wherein the distal part (1.1) comprises an actuating rod (1.6) and wherein a rotation of the rotator (1.3) of the proximal part (1.2) leads to the actuating rod (1.6) being axially displaced along the central axis (a') of the distal part (1.1). 4. The device according to any one of claims 1 to 3, wherein the device (1) further comprises an alignment guide system (3) arranged at the proximal part (1.2) for preventing rotational movement of the distal part (1.1). 5. The device according to any preceding claims, wherein the device (1) further comprises a torque-measuring device (4) adapted to measure a torque force applied to the rotator (1.3) and/or to yield at a predetermined torque. 6. An alignment guide system (3) adapted to be connected to the device (1) according to claim 1 or 2, wherein the alignment guide system (3) is selected from the group consisting of pins positioned in fixed angles relative to the distal part (1.1), at least one spirit level, at least one protractor and a laser guided system. 7. The alignment guide system (3) according to claim 6, wherein the alignment guide system (3) is digital. 8. A torque-measuring device (4) adapted to be connected to the device (1) according to claim 2 or 3, wherein the torque-measuring device (4) is adapted to measure a torque force applied to the rotator (1.3) and/or to yield at a predetermined torque. 9. The torque-measuring device (4) according to claim 8, wherein the torque-measuring device (4) comprises a torque ring, said torque ring driving a movement of the core (1.4) in relation to the sheath (1.5), until a set resistance threshold value. 10. The torque-measuring device (4) according to claim 8 or 9, wherein the torque- measuring device (4) is adapted to be mounted around the rotator (1.3) of the proximal part (1.2) of the device (1). 1 1. The torque-measuring device (4) according to claim 8 or 9, wherein the torque- measuring device (4) is adapted to be mounted inside the rotator (1.3) of the proximal part (1.2) of the device (1). 12. A system comprising a device (1) according to claim 1 or 2, an alignment guide system (3) according to claim 5 or 6 and/or a torque-measuring device (4) according to any one of claims 7 to 10.
